title: Academic Staff Mentoring Committee Agenda 07-14-23
body: Agenda Academic Staff Mentoring Committee Friday, July 14, 2023, 9:00 a.m. to 10:00 a.m. Microsoft Teams 9:00 am. – 9:05 am: Welcome, introductions, and selecting meeting minutes volunteer Select a meeting minutes volunteer 9:05 am – 9:10 am: Approve meeting minutes for April and May 9:10 am – 9:20 am: Review committee member elections and status Welcome new committee members Moses Altsech Members re-elected: Justin and Carmen One vacant position Members leaving, sign card before 5:00 p.m. CST on Friday July 14, 2023 Sign card for Alex Sign card for Tarakee Members who will be up for re-election: Peter, Kendra, Vanessa Another new member will be selected soon Review re-occurring tasks and perform an access review Plan for a day to or vote for co-chairs for 2023-2024 Confirm sub-committee membership for 2023-2024 9:20 am – 9:30 am: Mentor-Mentee Match ( Justin, Alissa, Kendra) Planning for August: Annual mentor match program invite and survey go out to all Academic Staff (sent by SOAS office) Determine who will lead next steps and our approach for updating the materials 9:30 a.m. to 9:45 a.m.: Events ( Liza, Vanessa, Carmen) Review the results of the 2022-2023 end of the year survey See also last year's goals Brainstorm and select 2-3 improvements for next year 9:45 a.m. to 9:55 a.m.: Resources ( Kendra, Peter, Alissa) Review and approve the proposed website page updates Identified new testimonials to use Confirm roles and responsibilities for implementing the improvements 9:55 am to 10:00 a.m.: Q&A and Open Discussion 10:00 am: Adjourn Next ASMC meeting: August 11, 2023
